result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make empathy and compassion the default lens through which people see each other—so that everyone naturally acts to reduce suffering and lift up others, creating a world where basic needs, dignity, and opportunity are within reach for all.

message.content: If I could change the world in one way, I’d make empathy and compassion the default lens through which people see each other—so that everyone naturally acts to reduce suffering and lift up others, creating a world where basic needs, dignity, and opportunity are within reach for all.
